evals.prompt: I just dropped a research paper PDF into my raw/ folder. Process it into my wiki. The file is raw/9_Reflexion_Verbal_Reinforcement_Learning.pdf
evals.expected_output: Wiki pages created for key concepts from the Reflexion paper, index.md updated, source summary written, processed.json updated, cross-links between pages

evals.prompt: I have some research papers in my raw/ folder that need to be added to my knowledge base wiki. There's already some content in the wiki from previous ingestion. Process any new unprocessed files. Only process raw/mem0.pdf
evals.expected_output: Agent checks processed.json, identifies mem0.pdf as unprocessed, reads existing wiki/index.md, creates or updates pages with cross-links to existing content, updates index and processed.json
Agent fetches URL content, extracts concepts about LLM agents, creates wiki pages with cross-links, writes source summary, updates index.md
